title: andropogon saxicola
intro: Andropogon saxicola, also known as Khas, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family, native to India and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, which help to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Andropogon saxicola include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as a natural remedy for digestive problems, among other uses. Herbal preparations of Andropogon saxicola include teas, infusions, and decoctions that can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
